Struggling to learn Korean? Stop memorizing random vocabulary! 📚 One of the biggest mistakes many international students make is trying to memorize hundreds of Korean words without understanding how they're actually used. I made the same mistake while studying Korean in Nepal, and honestly, it didn't work for me. After coming to Korea, I realized I needed a better way to learn the language. That's when I found one of the best beginner resources, and it completely changed how I studied. In this video, I share a book that I genuinely recommend to every beginner: 📖 My First 500 Korean Words by Talk To Me In Korean This book helps you build a strong foundation by teaching vocabulary through real-life stories and context instead of simple word lists. It's perfect if you're just starting your Korean language journey or preparing to study in South Korea. I also talk about other amazing books published by Talk To Me In Korean, covering grammar, listening, speaking, reading, and much more. Whether you're a complete beginner or already learning Korean, they have resources for every level. 🇳🇵 If you're currently in Nepal, you can access the digital/PDF version of these books before coming to Korea. 💻 I've also shared more information and resources on my website. Visit KoreaSathi to find guides on: ✅ Learning Korean ✅ Studying in Korea ✅ Student Visa (D-2 & D-4) ✅ NHIS Health Insurance ✅ Banking ✅ Transportation ✅ Finding Accommodation ✅ Part-time Jobs ✅ Life in South Korea I'm regularly publishing free guides to help international students succeed in Korea. 💬 What's your biggest challenge when learning Korean—vocabulary, grammar, speaking, or listening? Let me know in the comments! ❤️ Save this video for later, share it with a friend who's learning Korean, and follow KoreaSathi for practical tips on studying and living in South Korea. #LearnKorean #KoreanLanguage #StudyInKorea #TalkToMeInKorean #KoreanVocabulary#TOPIK#KoreanForBeginners #InternationalStudents #SouthKorea #koreaguidee #KoreaSathi #StudyAbroad #LifeInKorea #koreanepal #d2visa #d4
videos.ko: 한국어를 배우는데 어려움을 겪고 있나요? 무작위로 단어를 외우지 마세요! 📚 많은 유학생들이 저지르는 가장 큰 실수 중 하나는 수백 개의 한국어 단어가 실제로 어떻게 쓰이는지 이해하지 못한 채 외우려고 한다는 것입니다. 저도 네팔에서 한국어를 공부하면서 같은 실수를 했는데, 솔직히 저에게는 별로였어요. 한국에 온 후, 나는 언어를 배우는 데 더 나은 방법이 필요하다는 것을 깨달았습니다. 그때 최고의 초보자용 자료 중 하나를 찾았고, 그 덕분에 제가 공부하는 방식이 완전히 바뀌었습니다. 이 영상에서는 제가 모든 초보자에게 진심으로 추천하는 책을 공유합니다: 📖 Talk To Me In Korean의 My First 500 Korean Words 이 책은 단순한 단어 목록 대신 실제 이야기와 맥락을 통해 어휘를 가르쳐 탄탄한 기초를 다지는 데 도움이 됩니다. 막 한국어 여행을 시작하거나 한국 유학을 준비하는 경우에 적합합니다. 나는 또한 다른 놀라운 책들에 대해서도 이야기합니다.
